title: Emilia emilioides
taxonomy: Emilia emilioides is classified in the following manner: it belongs to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. This family is further divided into the tribe Inuleae. The genus Emilia falls within this tribe and is native to tropical Asia. The species Emilia emilioides is a type of flowering plant that is commonly found in fields and along roadsides. Its classification is further broken down into the kingdom Plantae.
